title: On blowup in supercritical wave equations
summary:
We study the blowup behavior for the focusing energy-supercritical semilinear
wave equation in 3 space dimensions without symmetry assumptions on the data.
We prove the stability of the ODE blowup profile.

title: Viscous singular shock profiles for a system of conservation laws   modeling two-phase flow
summary:
This paper is concerned with singular shocks for a system of conservation
laws modeling incompressible two-phase fluid flow. We prove the existence of
viscous profiles using the Geometric Singular Perturbation Theory. Weak
convergence and growth rates of the unbounded family of solutions are also
obtained.

title: Global existence for a degenerate haptotaxis model of cancer invasion
summary:
We propose and study a strongly coupled PDE-ODE system with tissue-dependent
degenerate diffusion and haptotaxis that can serve as a model prototype for
cancer cell invasion through the extracellular matrix. We prove the global
existence of weak solutions and illustrate the model behaviour by numerical
simulations for a two-dimensional setting.

title: Geometric Hardy inequalities for the sub-elliptic Laplacian on convex   domains in the Heisenberg group
summary:
We prove geometric $L^p$ versions of Hardy's inequality for the sub-elliptic
Laplacian on convex domains $\Omega$ in the Heisenberg group $\mathbb{H}^n$,
where convex is meant in the Euclidean sense. When $p=2$ and $\Omega$ is the
half-space given by $\langle \xi, \nu\rangle > d$ this generalizes an
inequality previously obtained by Luan and Yang. For such $p$ and $\Omega$ the
inequality is sharp and takes the form \begin{equation}
  \int_\Omega |\nabla_{\mathbb{H}^n}u|^2 \, d\xi \geq \frac{1}{4}\int_{\Omega}
\sum_{i=1}^n\frac{\langle X_i(\xi), \nu\rangle^2+\langle Y_i(\xi),
\nu\rangle^2}{\textrm{dist}(\xi, \partial \Omega)^2}|u|^2\, d\xi,
\end{equation} where $\textrm{dist}(\, \cdot\,, \partial \Omega)$ denotes the
Euclidean distance from $\partial \Omega$.
